positive: Stylized, minimalist line-art illustration featuring a cosmic whale swimming through constellations of glowing plankton and nebulae. The whale should have a sleek, elegant silhouette, rendered in deep indigo and cyan lines against a rich, midnight blue background. Geometric star clusters and stylized, bioluminescent flora should surround the main subject. Emphasize strong contrast and clean, bold linework suitable for screen printing on fabric. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, capturing a sense of wonder and deep space tranquility. Retro-futuristic, vector art, highly detailed, crisp.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, dirty, low quality, low resolution, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, messy, gradients, photorealistic, grainy, muted colors
